title: Claude Code sends 33k tokens before reading the prompt; OpenCode sends 7k
author: systima
aiHeadline: Claude Code: Because 33,000 tokens is the perfect number to send before actually reading the prompt, right? Meanwhile, OpenCode is the responsible adult who only sends 7,000 tokens and actually follows instructions.

title: Old and new apps, via modern coding agents
author: subset
aiHeadline: Old apps: Still stubbornly refusing to update, while new apps: 'Hey, look at me using modern coding agents! I'm basically a tech wizard now!'

title: Since Chromium 148, Math.tanh is now fingerprintable to link underlying OS
author: joahnn_s
aiHeadline: Chromium 148: Because what better way to track you than by making Math.tanh() reveal your OS? Privacy? Who needs that when you can have fingerprintable math functions!

title: I love LLMs, I hate hype
author: therepanic
aiHeadline: I love LLMs: They're like a magic 8-ball that always gives the right answer. I hate hype: Because it makes me question if I'm just a sucker for overpromised AI wizardry.

title: How to read more books
author: silcoon
aiHeadline: How to read more books: Just stop scrolling through social media, find a quiet corner, and pretend you're actually interested in the content. Bonus points if you can resist the urge to check your phone every 5 minutes.
